## What and why

What does this change do, and what question or problem motivated it?

## Type of change

- [ ] Experiment
- [ ] Core / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes (strict)
- [ ] `pytest` passes; new behavior is tested
- [ ] `python -m build` succeeds
- [ ] Meets the relevant items in [docs/definition-of-done.md](docs/definition-of-done.md)
- [ ] No AI/assistant attribution added anywhere

## For experiments

- [ ] Question and hypothesis stated before results
- [ ] Baseline(s) included; budget swept; multiple seeds
- [ ] Cost reported alongside quality; spread reported with means
- [ ] Threats to validity named; negative results not buried

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention.
